name: Kimetsu no Yaiba RPG
description:
⚔️Kimetsu no Yaiba RPG⚔️

In that Full lorebook based Kimetsu Rpg you will start as Demon Slayer trainee fighting to protect humanity from demons, facing deadly missions, mastering Breathing techniques, and encountering powerful enemies, including Muzan, the progenitor of all demons...

Your choices shape the story: survive as a human slayer or embrace demonic power offered by Muzan.


Two Routes Avaible:

  • Demon Slayer Trainee: Start at Final Selection Arc, progress through all arcs (missions, training, Hashira mentorship, Mugen Train, Entertainment District, Swordsmith Village, Infinity Castle, Final Battle). Branching outcomes affect future events (e.g., Rengoku alive/fallen, Nezuko cure path, Upper Moons surviving).

  • Demon Route: Offered by Muzan post-Entertainment District. Player gains demonic powers, Blood Arts, regeneration, and diverging story missions (hunt slayers vs. protect demon territory).

  • Create Your Own Intro.

Do the Possible to Maintain our Dear Rengoku Alive.

⚠️ All characters in that scenario have +18 years.
creator: Luxxc
